# NeuraPulse
> Expert AI blog by Prashant Lalwani. Covers Gemini AI advertising, ChatGPT ads, AI automation, AI tools, LLMs, and the future of AI. No hype. Just clarity.

## Pages
- Home: https://neuraplus-ai.github.io/
- Blog: https://neuraplus-ai.github.io/blog.html
- About: https://neuraplus-ai.github.io/about.html
- Contact: https://neuraplus-ai.github.io/contact.html
- Privacy: https://neuraplus-ai.github.io/privacy-policy.html

## Topics
- Gemini AI Advertising & ChatGPT Ads
- AI Automation (n8n, Zapier, Make)
- AI Tools (Groq, ElevenLabs, DeepL, Ollama, Perplexity)
- LLMs, Context Windows, Transformers
- Future of AI & AGI
